name: Pinout Generator
description: Generates component pinouts from a PCB to various formats (C, Python, Markdown, CSV...)
description_full:
Select one or more footprints in the PCB editor and run this plugin to export their pin assignments to a variety of formats:
- Text: Markdown table, HTML table, CSV, tab-separated list, WireViz.
- Code: C/C++ enum, C/C++ #define, C/C++ const int, Rust enum, Python/MicroPython dict, Xilinx XDC, Microsemi PDC.

Useful for generating documentation or copying pin assignments directly into firmware.
